calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-049 multi-resource heterogeneity substrate readiness diagnostic
items.notes: 4-arm sweep ARM_0/ARM_1/ARM_2/ARM_3 (OFF / 2-type / 3-type / 5-type overshoot) + curriculum-hook check. Substrate-readiness diagnostic only -- the behavioural goal_resource_r lift + identity-recovery probe lives in the Phase 2 successor V3-EXQ-514, queued after the z_resource encoder identity expansion + SD-032 consumer cascade lands. Pre-registered acceptance: C0 bit-identical OFF, C1a-b ARM_1 novelty-gated + food/water spawn, C2a-f ARM_2 substrate signatures, C3a-b ARM_3 obs-dim and 4-of-5 type spawn, CC1-2 curriculum gates water at step 0 and releases at step 1000.
